case_title: DAVE MARQUEZ VS. ESDJCO INTERNATIONAL, INC., A CALIFORNIA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARQUEZ, DAVE AS TO DEFENDANT ESDJCO INTERNATIONAL, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION STATON, SAM T.
